text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Wooow! Look, Trainer! Tatami mats!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: And hanging wall scrolls!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It feels just like a traditional Japanese hot spring
inn! How splendid!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, Fine Motion and I have arrived for the hot
spring vacation we won in the raffle.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...I think it's actually best if I give this to you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the time, Fine Motion wasn't sure if she'd even
be able to come on this trip.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, once it was decided that she'd be
staying in Japan, I gave it back to her.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You'll come with me, of course, right? Then, let's
decide when we'll go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...And so, here we are at the hot springs, with Fine
Motion's security team in tow.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Let's jump into the hot spring right away! With a
real big splash!
choice_data_list:
You're supposed to be quiet in the hot spring,
okay?

You're supposed to be quiet in the hot spring,
okay?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Okay, okay. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: The water was exquisite! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Did I! I'm soft, glossy, and smooth, from the top
of my head to the tip of my tail and down to my
very soul! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if they could build a hot spring in the
family's castle?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'd open it up to the public so that everyone in
Ireland could enjoy it.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Captain...

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
I'll be sure to make your desires known... On that
note, we'll be taking our leave now.

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
Under orders from Her Highness, we'll be lodging
elsewhere. We'll only be a stone's throw away, of
course.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It's not every day we go to a hot spring like this,
so I want everyone to recharge their batteries
without feeling on edge.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
And besides, I have Trainer with me. We'll be
okay, right, Trainer? ♪

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
...Very well. Please contact us immediately if
there's any trouble, no matter how trivial.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Understood!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...They're all so passionate about their work.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
They refused to leave my side, so before I knew
it, I ended up ordering them. I want them to enjoy
themselves, after all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think Fine Motion's security team is likely
happiest when they're at her side, but I opt to
bite my tongue.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Now then, why don't we go for a short stroll
before dinner?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hm, hm, hmmm. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's something bothering me. Just before, Fine
Motion said she wanted her security team to
recharge their batteries...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Why are you staring at me so intently? Has my
glossy skin caught your eye?
choice_data_list: Are you recharging your batteries right now?
Are you recharging your batteries right now?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh? Perhaps, you can't see it, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Come, look really closely! Can't you see the green
charging indicator on my back?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
See it flashing? Blip, blip! I'm sure those with a
truly discerning eye can spot it.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Excellent! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You know, I really like spending time with you. I
like how I am when we're together.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Of course, I also love being with my friends. I
even love myself, royal heritage and all.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
But when I'm with you... I'm a bit more selfish, a
bit more stubborn, and quite ridiculous.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
But you know, you could argue a little at least!
Especially about the being ridiculous part!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ehe. Well, I do have to live up to being called
"Her Highness." ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...
Phew...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: So that's why from now on...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Let me be your Fine Motion. Forever and ever!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Fine Motion and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during this time together.
